title: Property Consultant - Supertech Ventures Solutions - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Supertech Ventures Solutions - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
We at Supertech Ventures Solutions are looking for an experienced Property Consultant based out of Gwalior. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Supertech Ventures Solutions:
Supertech Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Supertech Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
